A

acceptEntrant(String, String, EventRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventRepository
Moves a user from pendingEntrants to chosenEntrants when they accept an invitation.
acceptInvitation(String, String, RegistrationRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.RegistrationRepository
 
addComment(String, String, String, String, CommentRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.CommentRepository
Adds a new comment to the event's comments subcollection.
addCoOrganizer(String, String, EventRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventRepository
Adds a user as a co-organizer to an event.
addEntrant(Entrant) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.WaitingList
Adds an entrant to the waiting list if they are not already present.
addEvent(Events) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventList
Adds an event to the list.
addEvent(Events) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.History
Adds an event to the history log.
addItem(Object) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.CustomLogs
This adds an item to the list if the item does not exist
addNotificationLog(Notification) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.CustomLogs
Adds a notification to the custom log
addToWaitingList(Entrant) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.Events
Adds an entrant to the waiting list if they are not already on it.
Admin - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Represents an admin user with elevated privileges for managing events, users, and content.
Admin() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.Admin
No-argument constructor required for Firestore deserialization.
Admin(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.Admin
Constructs an Admin with the specified user details.
AdminBrowseCommentsActivity - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Admin screen that loads every comment from every event in a single list.
AdminBrowseCommentsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.AdminBrowseCommentsActivity
 
AdminBrowseEventsActivity - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Activity that allows administrators to browse all events and remove events that violate application policies.
AdminBrowseEventsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.AdminBrowseEventsActivity
 
AdminBrowseImagesActivity - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Activity that allows administrators to browse uploaded images associated with events.
AdminBrowseImagesActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.AdminBrowseImagesActivity
 
AdminEventAdapter - Class in com.example.eventplanner
RecyclerView adapter used by administrators to display events and perform moderation actions such as removing events.
AdminEventAdapter(List<Events>, AdminEventAdapter.OnEventActionListener) - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.AdminEventAdapter
Constructs an adapter with the given event list and action listener.
AdminEventAdapter.OnEventActionListener - Interface in com.example.eventplanner
Interface used to notify the activity when an admin performs an action on an event.
AdminHubActivity - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Central admin dashboard activity providing navigation to all admin management screens including event browsing, image browsing, organizer removal, and comment browsing.
AdminHubActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.AdminHubActivity
 
AdminImageAdapter - Class in com.example.eventplanner
RecyclerView adapter used to display images uploaded for events.
AdminImageAdapter(List<String>, AdminImageAdapter.OnImageActionListener) - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.AdminImageAdapter
Constructs an adapter with the given image URL list and action listener.
AdminImageAdapter.OnImageActionListener - Interface in com.example.eventplanner
Listener interface for image removal actions triggered by the admin.
AdminNotificationAdapter - Class in com.example.eventplanner
RecyclerView adapter for displaying notification log entries in the admin view.
AdminNotificationAdapter(List<Notification>) - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.AdminNotificationAdapter
Constructs an adapter with the given notification log list.
AdminNotificationLogsActivity - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Admin screen that displays all notification logs across the system.
AdminNotificationLogsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.AdminNotificationLogsActivity
 
AdminOrganizerAdapter - Class in com.example.eventplanner
RecyclerView adapter used to display organizers to administrators and allow them to remove organizers from the system.
AdminOrganizerAdapter(List<User>, AdminOrganizerAdapter.OnOrganizerActionListener) - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.AdminOrganizerAdapter
Constructs an adapter with the given organizer list and action listener.
AdminOrganizerAdapter.OnOrganizerActionListener - Interface in com.example.eventplanner
Listener interface for organizer removal actions triggered by the admin.
AdminRemoveOrganizersActivity - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Activity that allows administrators to view organizers and remove those who violate application policies.
AdminRemoveOrganizersActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.AdminRemoveOrganizersActivity
 

B

BrowseEventsActivity - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Activity for browsing and filtering events with search, sort, and tag filtering.
BrowseEventsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.BrowseEventsActivity
 
btnCancel - Variable in class com.example.eventplanner.PendingEntrantAdapter.ViewHolder
Button to cancel the pending entrant.

C

cancelEntrant(String, String, EventRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventRepository
Moves a user from pendingEntrants to cancelledEntrants when they decline or are cancelled.
cancelRegistration(String, String, RegistrationRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.RegistrationRepository
Marks a registration as cancelled by the organizer (entrant did not sign up).
CHANNEL_ID_INVITATIONS - Static variable in class com.example.eventplanner.NotificationHelper
Channel ID for invitation heads-up notifications.
clearItems() - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.CustomLogs
Clears all the items in the custom log
com.example.eventplanner - package com.example.eventplanner
 
Comment - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Represents a single comment on an event.

Required no-arg constructor for Firestore deserialization.

CommentsActivity - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Displays the comment section for a specific event.

countEvents() - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventList
Returns the number of events in the list.
countEvents() - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.History
Returns the number of events in the history.
countItems() - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.CustomLogs
This checks the number of items in the list

Creates a new event document in Firestore.

Activity for creating a new event in the app.

This is an abstract class that defines a custom log/list

D

declineInvitation(String, String, RegistrationRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.RegistrationRepository
Marks a registration or invitation as declined for a given event and user.
deleteComment(String, String, CommentRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.CommentRepository
Deletes a comment.
deleteEntrant(Entrant) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.WaitingList
Removes a specified entrant from the waiting list
deleteEvent(Events) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventList
Deletes an event from the list.
deleteEvent(Events) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.History
Removes an event from the history log.
deleteEvent(String, EventRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventRepository
Deletes an event document from Firestore.
deleteItem(Object) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.CustomLogs
This deletes an item if it exists within the list
deleteUser(String, UserRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.UserRepository
Deletes a user profile by device id.
dispatchTouchEvent(MotionEvent) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.HomePage
 
drawFromWaitlist(String, int, EventRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventRepository
Draws a specified number of random entrants from the waitingList, moves them to pendingEntrants, and creates "invited" registration records.

E

ensureChannel(Context) - Static method in class com.example.eventplanner.NotificationHelper
Creates the invitation notification channel if it does not already exist.
Entrant - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Model class that represents an entrant in the app.
Entrant() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.Entrant
No argument constructor required for firestore
Entrant(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.Entrant
Constructs an Entrant with the specified user details.
EntrantLocation - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Model storing an entrant's geographic coordinates for geolocation-required events.
EntrantLocation() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.EntrantLocation
No-argument constructor required for Firestore deserialization.
EntrantLocation(String, double, double, Timestamp) - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.EntrantLocation
Constructs an EntrantLocation with all fields specified.
EventAdapter - Class in com.example.eventplanner
RecyclerView adapter for event cards, routing to organizer or entrant views based on role.
EventAdapter(List<Events>) - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.EventAdapter
Constructs an adapter with the given event list.
EventCarouselAdapter - Class in com.example.eventplanner
ViewPager2 adapter that displays public events in a horizontal carousel.
EventCarouselAdapter(List<Events>) - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.EventCarouselAdapter
Constructs a carousel adapter with the given event list.
EventDescriptionView - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Activity that displays the details of a specific event and allows the user to join or leave the waitlist, and for organizers to view the waitlist.
EventDescriptionView() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.EventDescriptionView
 
EventHistoryActivity - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Activity that displays the user's event registration history.
EventHistoryActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.EventHistoryActivity
 
EventList - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Displays a list of events using a custom log-based layout.
EventList() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.EventList
 
EventRepository - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Repository for CRUD and waitlist operations on Event documents in Firestore.
EventRepository() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.EventRepository
Initializes the repository with a Firestore instance.
EventRepository.CountCallback - Interface in com.example.eventplanner
Callback interface for fetching the number of entrants on a waitlist.
EventRepository.EntrantsCallback - Interface in com.example.eventplanner
Callback interface for fetching a list of entrants.
EventRepository.EventCallback - Interface in com.example.eventplanner
Callback interface for fetching a single event.
EventRepository.EventsCallback - Interface in com.example.eventplanner
Callback interface for fetching a list of events.
EventRepository.SimpleCallback - Interface in com.example.eventplanner
Callback interface for successful and failed operations.
EventRepository.WaitlistStatusCallback - Interface in com.example.eventplanner
Callback interface for checking if a user is on a waitlist.
Events - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Represents an event in the event planner application.
Events() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.Events
No-argument constructor required for Firestore deserialization.
Events(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.Events
Constructs a minimal event with core details.
Events(String, String, String, String, String, String, int, String, Timestamp) - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.Events
Constructs a fully specified event, typically used when reading from Firestore.
EventTypeFragment - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Dialog fragment that lets the user choose between creating a public or private event.
EventTypeFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.EventTypeFragment
 
EventWaitlistActivity - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Activity showing the waitlist for an event with join and leave functionality.
EventWaitlistActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.EventWaitlistActivity

fetchWaitlistEntrants(String, EventRepository.EntrantsCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventRepository

Dialog showing the event waitlist with navigation to pending, selected, and cancelled entrant views.
FragmentFinalEntrantList() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.FragmentFinalEntrantList
 
FragmentPendingInvites - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Shows entrants with pending invitations (status "invited", not yet accepted).
FragmentPendingInvites() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.FragmentPendingInvites
 
FragmentPostDrawWaitlist - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Shows cancelled/declined entrants and allows the organizer to redraw replacements from the waiting list.
FragmentPostDrawWaitlist() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.FragmentPostDrawWaitlist
 
FragmentPreDrawWaitlist - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Shows all entrants currently on the waitlist for an event, before the draw has taken place.
FragmentPreDrawWaitlist() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.FragmentPreDrawWaitlist
 
FragmentPrivateEventSetup - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Setup dialog for creating a private event with registration dates, capacity, and tags.

FragmentPublicEventSetup - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Setup dialog for creating a public event with registration dates, capacity, and tags.

FragmentSelectedEntrants - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Dialog displaying all selected entrants (invited, accepted, or declined) for an event.

J

joinEvent(String, String, RegistrationRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.RegistrationRepository
Creates or replaces a registration record for a user joining an event.
joinWaitingList(String, String, EventRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventRepository
Adds a user to the waitingList of an event.

L

leaveEvent(String, String, RegistrationRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.RegistrationRepository
Deletes a registration record for a user leaving an event.
leaveWaitingList(String, String, EventRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventRepository
Removes a user from the waitingList of an event.
listenToComments(String, CommentRepository.CommentsCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.CommentRepository
Attaches a real-time listener to the comments subcollection, ordered oldest-first.
listenToLocations(String, LocationRepository.LocationsCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.LocationRepository
Attaches a real-time listener to the attendee_locations subcollection.
listenToWaitlistCount(String, EventRepository.CountCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventRepository
Fetches the number of entrants on the waitingList of an event.

O

onBindViewHolder(AdminEventAdapter.EventViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.AdminEventAdapter
Binds event data to the ViewHolder at the given position.
onBindViewHolder(AdminImageAdapter.ImageViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.AdminImageAdapter
Binds image data to the ViewHolder at the given position using Glide.
onBindViewHolder(AdminNotificationAdapter.LogViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.AdminNotificationAdapter
Binds notification log data to the ViewHolder at the given position.
onBindViewHolder(AdminOrganizerAdapter.OrganizerViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.AdminOrganizerAdapter
Binds organizer data to the ViewHolder at the given position.
onBindViewHolder(EventAdapter.EventViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventAdapter
Binds event data to the ViewHolder and sets up the click listener to route to the organizer or entrant view based on the user's role.
onBindViewHolder(EventCarouselAdapter.CarouselViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventCarouselAdapter
Binds event data to the carousel card at the given position, loading the event image and organizer name asynchronously.
onBindViewHolder(InviteUserAdapter.UserViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.InviteUserAdapter
Binds user data to the ViewHolder at the given position.
onBindViewHolder(PendingEntrantAdapter.ViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.PendingEntrantAdapter
Binds entrant data to the ViewHolder at the given position.
onBindViewHolder(WaitlistAdapter.ViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.WaitlistAdapter
Binds entrant data to the ViewHolder at the given position.
onCancelClicked(Entrant, int) - Method in interface com.example.eventplanner.PendingEntrantAdapter.OnCancelClickListener
Called when the organizer clicks cancel on a pending entrant.

Initializes the activity, sets up the RecyclerView, and loads all comments.

Initializes the activity, sets up the RecyclerView, and loads all events.

Initializes the activity and sets up navigation buttons to each admin screen.

Initializes the activity, sets up the RecyclerView, and loads notification logs.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.AdminRemoveOrganizersActivity
Initializes the activity, sets up the organizer list, and loads organizer data.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.BrowseEventsActivity
Initializes the activity, sets up the event list, search bar, filter button, and bottom navigation.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.CommentsActivity
Initializes the activity, sets up the comment list and input field, and starts listening for real-time comment updates.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.CreateEventActivity
Sets up navigation, image selection, and event creation logic.

onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventHistoryActivity
Initializes the activity, sets up the list view, and loads the user's event registration history from Firestore.

Enables notifications for the entrant.
optOutNotifications() - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.Entrant
Disables notifications for the entrant.
Organizer - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Represents an organizer who can create and manage events.
Organizer() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.Organizer
No-argument constructor required for Firestore deserialization.
Organizer(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.Organizer
Constructs an Organizer with the specified user details.

P

PendingEntrantAdapter - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Adapter for pending entrants list with a cancel button per row.

Constructs an adapter with the given entrant list and cancel listener.
PendingEntrantAdapter.OnCancelClickListener - Interface in com.example.eventplanner
Listener interface for cancel actions on pending entrants.
PendingEntrantAdapter.ViewHolder - Class in com.example.eventplanner
ViewHolder for a pending entrant row containing name, ID, and a cancel button.

Activity that displays the current user's profile information.
Profile() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.Profile
 
ProfileSettingsActivity - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Activity that provides profile management settings for the current user.
ProfileSettingsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.ProfileSettingsActivity
 
ProfileSetup - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Activity: New user sets up their profile Prompts user for their name, email, and phone number.
ProfileSetup() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.ProfileSetup
 

R

RegistrationRepository - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Repository for event registration records in Firestore Supports join, leave, and invitation response flows.
RegistrationRepository() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.RegistrationRepository
Creates a new repository backed by the default Firestore instance.
RegistrationRepository.SimpleCallback - Interface in com.example.eventplanner
Callback for operations that only need to report success or failure.
removeEntrantCompletely(String, String, EventRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventRepository
Removes a user from all entrant arrays (waitingList, pendingEntrants, chosenEntrants, cancelledEntrants).
removeFromWaitingList(Entrant) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.Events
Removes an entrant from the waiting list if they are present.
removeLocation(String, String, LocationRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.LocationRepository
Removes the attendee's location document from the subcollection.
reviewNotificationLogs(CustomLogs) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.Admin
Retrieves all notification log entries from the given custom log.

S

SearchScreen - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Activity for scanning QR codes to quickly navigate to an event page.

sendNoticeToUsers(String, List<String>, String, String, RegistrationRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.RegistrationRepository
Sends the same in-app notice to a list of users while preserving their current status.
sendNotification(Entrant, Events, String, String, String, CustomLogs) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.Organizer
Sends a notification to an entrant about an event, logging it if the entrant has notifications enabled.

U

updateEvent(Events, EventRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventRepository
Updates an event document in Firestore.
updateGeolocationRequired(String, boolean, EventRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.EventRepository
Updates the geolocationRequired field of an event.
updateInvitationStatus(String, String, String, RegistrationRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.RegistrationRepository
Updates the status of an event registration/invitation for a specific user.
updateLocation(String, String, double, double, LocationRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.LocationRepository
Writes or updates the caller's location for the given event.
upsertUser(User, UserRepository.SimpleCallback) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.UserRepository
Creates or replaces a user profile document in Firestore.
User - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Represents a user of the Event Planner application.
User() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.User
Default constructor required for Firestore.
User(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.User
Constructs a User with the specified information.
UserRepository - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Repository for user profile persistence in Firestore.
UserRepository() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.UserRepository
Creates a new repository backed by the default Firestore instance.
UserRepository.SimpleCallback - Interface in com.example.eventplanner
Callback for operations that only need to report success or failure.
UserRepository.UserCallback - Interface in com.example.eventplanner
Callback for operations that return a single User.
UserRepository.UsersCallback - Interface in com.example.eventplanner
Callback for operations that return multiple User objects.
UserSettings - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Model holding user preference settings such as notification toggles.
UserSettings() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.UserSettings
Default constructor required for Firestore.
UserSettings(String, String, String, String, String, boolean, boolean, boolean) - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.UserSettings
Constructs a UserSettings object with the specified settings.
UserSettingsActivity - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Activity displaying the user's profile settings with notification toggles and a delete-profile option.
UserSettingsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.UserSettingsActivity

Constructs the ViewHolder and binds the views.
viewWaitingList(Events) - Method in class com.example.eventplanner.Organizer
Returns the current entrants on the event's waiting list.

W

WaitingList - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Represents the waiting list for an event, maintaining a local list of object Entrant
WaitingList() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.WaitingList
Constructs an empty waiting list.
WaitlistActivity - Class in com.example.eventplanner
Activity displaying the waitlist for a specific event with real-time updates.
WaitlistActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventplanner.WaitlistActivity
 
WaitlistAdapter - Class in com.example.eventplanner
RecyclerView adapter for displaying entrant names and emails in a waitlist.

Constructs an adapter with the given entrant list.
WaitlistAdapter.ViewHolder - Class in com.example.eventplanner
ViewHolder for a waitlist entrant row containing name and ID/email.
